mapper.select:
SELECT rcm.UTLINSTT_ID , eim.ETNM AS BPLC_NM , rcm.INVM_STG_CD , rcm.INVM_AMT_CD , eid.ENPR_DSNC_CLSF_CD
, ccd_com.COM_CD_NM AS ENPR_DSNC_CLSF_NM , ccd_stg.COM_CD_NM AS INVM_STG_NM , ccd_amt.COM_CD_NM AS INVM_AMT_NM
, CASE WHEN TRIM(eim.CMPNY_LOGO_IMAGE_FILE) IS NULL THEN eim.CMPNY_LOGO_BASS_IMAGE_FILE ELSE eim.CMPNY_LOGO_IMAGE_FILE END AS LOGO_IMAGE_URL
, CASE WHEN TRIM(eim.CMPNY_LOGO_IMAGE_FILE) IS NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS DEFAULT_LOGO_YN
, CASE WHEN eim.NW_ADRES_AT = 'Y' THEN CONCAT(CONCAT(eim.NW_ADRES, ' '), eim.NW_ADRES_DETAIL) ELSE CONCAT(CONCAT(eim.ADRES, ' '), eim.DETAIL_ADRES) END AS ADDRESS
, CASE WHEN pref_mapp.PREF_CNT IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE pref_mapp.PREF_CNT END AS PREF_CNT , CASE WHEN pref_yn.UTLINSTT_ID IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS LOGIN_USIS_LIKE_YN
, ROWNUM FROM ( SELECT main.UTLINSTT_ID , main.INVM_STG_CD , main.INVM_AMT_CD , SUM(main.TOTAL) FROM (
SELECT sub.UTLINSTT_ID , com_hope.INVM_STG_CD , com_hope.INVM_AMT_CD , NVL(COUNT(sub.INVM_FILD_CD), 0) AS TOTAL FROM TB_BOX_IVT_ENPR_IVFL_R sub
INNER JOIN ( SELECT UTLINSTT_ID, INVM_STG_CD, INVM_AMT_CD FROM TB_BOX_IVT_INVM_HOPE_D WHERE OPPB_YN = 'Y' ) com_hope ON sub.UTLINSTT_ID = com_hope.UTLINSTT_ID
INNER JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT INVM_FILD_CD FROM TB_BOX_IVT_VC_PRTF_L WHERE UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId} ) pf_fild ON sub.INVM_FILD_CD = pf_fild.INVM_FILD_CD
GROUP BY sub.UTLINSTT_ID, com_hope.INVM_STG_CD, com_hope.INVM_AMT_CD
UNION ALL
SELECT sub.UTLINSTT_ID , sub.INVM_STG_CD , sub.INVM_AMT_CD , NVL(COUNT(sub.INVM_STG_CD), 0) AS TOTAL FROM TB_BOX_IVT_INVM_HOPE_D sub
INNER JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT INVM_STG_CD FROM TB_BOX_IVT_VC_PRTF_L WHERE UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId} ) pf_fild ON sub.INVM_STG_CD = pf_fild.INVM_STG_CD
WHERE sub.OPPB_YN = 'Y' GROUP BY sub.UTLINSTT_ID, sub.INVM_STG_CD, sub.INVM_AMT_CD
) main
LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_VNCM_CPTL_L vc_chk ON main.UTLINSTT_ID = vc_chk.UTLINSTT_ID
WHERE (vc_chk.UTLINSTT_ID IS NULL OR vc_chk.USE_YN != 'Y') GROUP BY main.UTLINSTT_ID, main.INVM_STG_CD, main.INVM_AMT_CD ORDER BY SUM(main.TOTAL) DESC, DBMS_RANDOM.RANDOM ) rcm
INNER JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_ENPR_INFO_M eim ON eim.UTLINSTT_ID = rcm.UTLINSTT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_ENPR_INFO_D eid ON eid.UTLINSTT_ID = rcm.UTLINSTT_ID
LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_COM_CD_D ccd_com ON ccd_com.COM_CD_ID = eid.ENPR_DSNC_CLSF_CD LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_COM_CD_D ccd_stg ON ccd_stg.COM_CD_ID = rcm.INVM_STG_CD LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_COM_CD_D ccd_amt ON ccd_amt.COM_CD_ID = rcm.INVM_AMT_CD
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT PRFN_USIS_ID , COUNT(*) AS PREF_CNT FROM TB_BOX_IVT_PRFN_USIS_R GROUP BY PRFN_USIS_ID ) pref_mapp ON rcm.UTLINSTT_ID = pref_mapp.PRFN_USIS_ID
LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_PRFN_USIS_R pref_yn ON (rcm.UTLINSTT_ID = pref_yn.PRFN_USIS_ID AND pref_yn.UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId})
WHERE 1=1 AND eim.ACVT_YN = 'Y' AND ROWNUM < 19

SELECT eim.UTLINSTT_ID , eim.ETNM AS BPLC_NM , eim.INCR_YMD AS FOND_DE , eim.ENPR_JNNG_DT
, NVL(nid.EMP_CNT, 0) AS EMP_CNT , NVL(nid.CREW_RTRV, 0) AS CREW_RTRV FROM TB_BOX_IVT_ENPR_INFO_M eim LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_VNCM_CPTL_L tbivcl ON eim.UTLINSTT_ID = tbivcl.UTLINSTT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_ENPR_INFO_D nid ON eim.UTLINSTT_ID = nid.UTLINSTT_ID
WHERE 1=1 AND (tbivcl.UTLINSTT_ID IS NULL OR tbivcl.USE_YN != 'Y') AND eim.ACVT_YN = 'Y'
ORDER BY eim.ENPR_JNNG_DT DESC, eim.INCR_YMD DESC

SELECT eim.UTLINSTT_ID , eim.ETNM AS BPLC_NM , eim.ENPR_JNNG_DT , TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY')) - decode(trim(eim.INCR_YMD), NULL, NULL, (TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(eim.INCR_YMD, 0, 4)))) AS YEAR_CNT
, nid.BTNM , nid.ENPR_INRD_CON
, nid.BSUN_DWAR_CD , ccd_dwar.COM_CD_NM AS BSUN_DWAR_NM
, CASE WHEN nid.RCMD_ENPR_STUP_YN IS NULL THEN 'N' WHEN nid.RCMD_ENPR_STUP_YN = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RCMD_ENPR_STUP_YN , CASE WHEN ihd.OPPB_YN IS NULL THEN 'N' WHEN ihd.OPPB_YN = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS INVM_HOPE_YN
, CASE WHEN TRIM(eim.CMPNY_LOGO_IMAGE_FILE) IS NULL THEN eim.CMPNY_LOGO_BASS_IMAGE_FILE ELSE eim.CMPNY_LOGO_IMAGE_FILE END AS LOGO_IMAGE_URL , CASE WHEN eim.NW_ADRES_AT = 'Y' THEN CONCAT(CONCAT(eim.NW_ADRES, ' '), eim.NW_ADRES_DETAIL) ELSE CONCAT(CONCAT(eim.ADRES, ' '), eim.DETAIL_ADRES) END AS ADDRESS
, CASE WHEN TRIM(eim.CMPNY_LOGO_IMAGE_FILE) IS NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS DEFAULT_LOGO_YN
, CASE WHEN pref_mapp.PREF_CNT IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE pref_mapp.PREF_CNT END AS PREF_CNT
, CASE WHEN pref_yn.UTLINSTT_ID IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS LOGIN_USIS_LIKE_YN
FROM TB_BOX_IVT_ENPR_INFO_M eim LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_VNCM_CPTL_L tbivcl ON eim.UTLINSTT_ID = tbivcl.UTLINSTT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_ENPR_INFO_D nid ON eim.UTLINSTT_ID = nid.UTLINSTT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_INVM_HOPE_D ihd ON eim.UTLINSTT_ID = ihd.UTLINSTT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_ENPR_INFO_D eid ON eim.UTLINSTT_ID = eid.UTLINSTT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_COM_CD_D ccd_dwar ON ccd_dwar.COM_CD_ID = nid.BSUN_DWAR_CD
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT PRFN_USIS_ID , COUNT(*) AS PREF_CNT FROM TB_BOX_IVT_PRFN_USIS_R GROUP BY PRFN_USIS_ID ) pref_mapp ON eim.UTLINSTT_ID = pref_mapp.PRFN_USIS_ID
LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_PRFN_USIS_R pref_yn ON (eim.UTLINSTT_ID = pref_yn.PRFN_USIS_ID AND pref_yn.UTLINSTT_ID = #{loginUsisId})
LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_ENPR_IVFL_R eir ON eim.UTLINSTT_ID = eir.UTLINSTT_ID
WHERE 1=1 AND eim.ACVT_YN = 'Y'
AND (tbivcl.UTLINSTT_ID IS NULL OR tbivcl.USE_YN != 'Y')
AND UPPER(eim.ETNM) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{bplcNm}) || '%'
AND eir.INVM_FILD_CD = #{invmFildCd}
AND nid.ENPR_DSNC_CLSF_CD = #{enprDsncClsfCd}
AND nid.BSUN_DWAR_CD = #{bsunDwarCd}
AND #{msrnAmslAmtSt} <= nid.MSRN_AMSL_AMT
AND nid.MSRN_AMSL_AMT <= #{msrnAmslAmtFn}
AND #{fondDeSt} <= eim.INCR_YMD
AND eim.INCR_YMD <= #{fondDeFn}
AND #{empCntSt} <= nid.EMP_CNT
AND nid.EMP_CNT <= #{empCntFn}
AND (CASE WHEN ihd.OPPB_YN IS NULL THEN 'N' WHEN ihd.OPPB_YN = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) = #{invmHopeYn}
AND (CASE WHEN nid.RCMD_ENPR_STUP_YN IS NULL THEN 'N' WHEN nid.RCMD_ENPR_STUP_YN = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) = #{rcmdEnprStupYn}
AND (CASE WHEN pref_mapp.PREF_CNT IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE pref_mapp.PREF_CNT END) > 0
AND (CASE WHEN ihd.OSIV_HOPEYN IS NULL THEN 'N' WHEN ihd.OSIV_HOPEYN = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) = #{osivHopeyn}
ORDER BY
DBMS_RANDOM.RANDOM
pref_mapp.PREF_CNT DESC, eim.INCR_YMD DESC
eim.ENPR_JNNG_DT DESC, eim.INCR_YMD DESC

SELECT eim.* , eim.ETNM AS BPLC_NM , eim.INCR_YMD AS FOND_DE , eim.BZN AS BIZRNO
, nid.ENFM_CLSF_CD , ccd_clsf.COM_CD_NM AS ENFM_CLSF_NM
, nid.ENPR_DSNC_CLSF_CD , ccd_dsnc.COM_CD_NM AS ENPR_DSNC_CLSF_NM
, nid.BSUN_DWAR_CD , ccd_dwar.COM_CD_NM AS BSUN_DWAR_NM
, nid.EMP_CNT , nid.BTNM , nid.BZST_NM , nid.MSRN_AMSL_YEAR , nid.MSRN_AMSL_AMT , CASE WHEN nid.LSTN_YN IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE nid.LSTN_YN END AS LSTN_YN , nid.ENPR_INRD_CON , nid.CREW_RTRV
, CASE WHEN pref_mapp.PREF_CNT IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE pref_mapp.PREF_CNT END AS PREF_CNT
, CASE WHEN pref_yn.UTLINSTT_ID IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS LOGIN_USIS_LIKE_YN
FROM TB_BOX_IVT_ENPR_INFO_M eim LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_VNCM_CPTL_L tbivcl ON eim.UTLINSTT_ID = tbivcl.UTLINSTT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_ENPR_INFO_D nid ON eim.UTLINSTT_ID = nid.UTLINSTT_ID
LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_COM_CD_D ccd_clsf ON ccd_clsf.COM_CD_ID = nid.ENFM_CLSF_CD LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_COM_CD_D ccd_dsnc ON ccd_dsnc.COM_CD_ID = nid.ENPR_DSNC_CLSF_CD LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_COM_CD_D ccd_dwar ON ccd_dwar.COM_CD_ID = nid.BSUN_DWAR_CD
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT PRFN_USIS_ID , COUNT(*) AS PREF_CNT FROM TB_BOX_IVT_PRFN_USIS_R GROUP BY PRFN_USIS_ID ) pref_mapp ON eim.UTLINSTT_ID = pref_mapp.PRFN_USIS_ID
LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_PRFN_USIS_R pref_yn ON (eim.UTLINSTT_ID = pref_yn.PRFN_USIS_ID AND pref_yn.UTLINSTT_ID = #{loginUsisId})
WHERE 1=1
AND (tbivcl.UTLINSTT_ID IS NULL OR tbivcl.USE_YN != 'Y')
AND eim.UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId}
SELECT UTLINSTT_ID , CNRN_FILD_SQN , CNRN_FILD_NM , RGSN_USER_ID , RGSN_TS FROM TB_BOX_IVT_CNRN_FILD_L WHERE UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId} ORDER BY CNRN_FILD_SQN ASC

SELECT epl.UTLINSTT_ID , epl.PRDT_ID , epl.PRDT_NM , epl.PRDT_IMG_FILE_ID AS IMG_FILE_ID , epl.PRDT_IMG_FILE_ID AS FILE_ID , epl.DEL_YN
, epl.RGSN_USER_ID , epl.RGSN_TS , epl.AMNN_USER_ID , epl.AMNN_TS FROM TB_BOX_IVT_ENPR_PRDT_L epl WHERE epl.UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId} AND epl.DEL_YN = 'N'

SELECT epl.UTLINSTT_ID , epl.PRDT_ID , epl.PRDT_NM , epl.PRDT_PTRN , epl.PRDT_DESC , epl.PRDT_CHRC , epl.DEL_YN
, epl.PRDT_IMG_FILE_ID AS IMG_FILE_ID , epl.PRDT_IMG_FILE_ID AS FILE_ID
, epl.RGSN_USER_ID , epl.RGSN_TS , epl.AMNN_USER_ID , epl.AMNN_TS FROM TB_BOX_IVT_ENPR_PRDT_L epl WHERE epl.UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId} AND epl.PRDT_ID = #{prdtId} AND epl.DEL_YN = 'N'
SELECT UTLINSTT_ID , PRDT_ID , KWR_SQN , KWR_NM , RGSN_USER_ID , RGSN_TS FROM TB_BOX_IVT_ENPR_KWRD_L WHERE UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId} AND PRDT_ID = #{prdtId} ORDER BY KWR_SQN ASC

SELECT eir.UTLINSTT_ID , eir.IVFL_SQN , eir.INVM_FILD_CD , eir.RGSN_USER_ID , eir.RGSN_TS
, ifc.INVM_FILD_CDNM AS INVM_FILD_NM FROM TB_BOX_IVT_ENPR_IVFL_R eir LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_INVM_FILD_C ifc ON eir.INVM_FILD_CD = ifc.INVM_FILD_CD WHERE eir.UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId} ORDER BY eir.IVFL_SQN

SELECT etr.UTLINSTT_ID , etr.UTLZ_TCHN_SQN , etr.UTLZ_TCHN_CD , etr.RGSN_USER_ID , etr.RGSN_TS
, utc.UTLZ_TCHN_CDNM AS UTLZ_TCHN_NM FROM TB_BOX_IVT_ENPR_TCHN_R etr LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_UTLZ_TCHN_C utc ON etr.UTLZ_TCHN_CD = utc.UTLZ_TCHN_CD WHERE etr.UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId} ORDER BY etr.UTLZ_TCHN_SQN

SELECT tbiet.UTLINSTT_ID , tbiet.TMMB_ID , tbiet.TMMB_NM , tbiet.TMMB_JBCL , tbiet.CRR_CON , tbiet.TMMB_IMG_FILE_ID AS IMG_FILE_ID , tbiet.TMMB_IMG_FILE_ID AS FILE_ID
, tbiet.RGSN_USER_ID , tbiet.RGSN_TS , tbiet.AMNN_USER_ID , tbiet.AMNN_TS FROM TB_BOX_IVT_ENPR_TMMB_L tbiet WHERE tbiet.UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId} ORDER BY tbiet.RGSN_TS ASC
SELECT UTLINSTT_ID , INRD_PICT_SQN , INRD_PICT_TTL , INRD_PICT_URL , RGSN_USER_ID , RGSN_TS FROM TB_BOX_IVT_ENPR_INTRO_L WHERE UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId}
SELECT UTLINSTT_ID , PRFN_USIS_ID , RGSN_USER_ID , RGSN_TS FROM TB_BOX_IVT_PRFN_USIS_R WHERE UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId} AND PRFN_USIS_ID = #{prfnUsisId}
mapper.update: MERGE INTO TB_BOX_IVT_ENPR_INFO_D tbieid USING DUAL ON (tbieid.UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET CREW_RTRV = ( SELECT CASE WHEN CREW_RTRV IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE CREW_RTRV + 1 END AS CREW_RTRV FROM TB_BOX_IVT_ENPR_INFO_D WHERE UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId} ) WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( UTLINSTT_ID , CREW_RTRV , RGSN_USER_ID , RGSN_TS ) VALUES ( #{utlinsttId} , 1 , '' , CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
DELETE FROM TB_BOX_IVT_ENPR_TMMB_L WHERE UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId} AND TMMB_ID = #{tmmbId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM TB_BOX_IVT_ENPR_KWRD_L WHERE UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId} AND PRDT_ID = #{prdtId}
DELETE FROM TB_BOX_IVT_PRFN_USIS_R WHERE UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId} AND PRFN_USIS_ID = #{prfnUsisId}
